charts.medical_history: Asthma diagnosed in 2020. Uses Albuterol inhaler when active.

visits.symptoms: Mild wheezing, coughing after gym class.
visits.treatment: Administered 2 puffs of Ventolin inhaler. Rested for 30 minutes in sickbay.
visits.nurse_remarks: Wheezing resolved. Returned to class. Instructed to keep inhaler in backpack.
